name: UBA : Browsed to Business/Service Website
notes:
A user has accessed a URL which may indicate elevated security or legal risk.

References: 
    http://sitereview.bluecoat.com/categories.jsp
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : URL Category Filter

when the event matches "Web Category" ilike '%business%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%financ%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%stock%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%trading%'OR "Web Category" ilike '%job%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%auction%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%fashion%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%real estate%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%marketing%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%vehicle%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%pharmacy%' OR "Web Category" in (2, 68, 96, 102, 203) AQL filter query
